{{Relic Infobox|Pael's Claw|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Enchant|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Goopy|2}}
{{R|Pael's Claw||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} that {{KW|Enchant|Enchants|2}} all {{C|Defend (Ironclad)|Defends|2}} in your Deck with {{KW|Goopy||2}}.

== Obtaining Pael's Claw ==
At the start of {{2|Acts#Act 2|Act 2|2}}, can be offered by {{KW|Pael||2}}.

== Notes ==
* {{R|Pael's Claw||2}} will also {{KW|Enchant||2}} any {{C|Ultimate Defend|Ultimate Defends}} in your Deck with {{KW|Goopy||2}}.
* If any {{C|Defend (Ironclad)|Defends|2}} are already {{KW|Enchant|Enchanted|2}}, they will not be given {{KW|Goopy||2}}, as each card can only be {{KW|Enchant|Enchanted|2}} once.

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Pael's Claw to the game.
